fields.avatarDrop: Drop image here or click to upload
fields.avatarInvalidType: Only JPG, PNG, and WebP images are allowed
fields.title: Title
fields.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

summaryGuide.title: Writing Guide
summaryGuide.tip1: Keep it to 3-5 sentences, about 100-200 words
summaryGuide.tip2: Highlight your core strengths and career positioning
summaryGuide.tip3: Quantify achievements with data (e.g., "improved efficiency by 30%")
summaryGuide.tip4: Match keywords from the target job description to improve ATS pass rate
summaryGuide.tip5: Avoid first-person pronouns; state facts directly

experienced.name: Senior Engineer
experienced.content: Senior engineer with [years] years of experience in [field], specializing in [techStack]. Led architecture design and delivery of multiple large-scale projects serving over [number] million users. Strong team collaboration and technical problem-solving skills, adept at translating complex business requirements into high-performance, scalable technical solutions.

junior.name: Entry Level / Junior
junior.content: [major] graduate with solid computer science fundamentals and clean coding habits. Proficient in [techStack], contributed to [count] projects during university, including [project] which won a campus excellence award. Fast learner passionate about new technologies, eager to grow in a challenging team environment.

careerChange.name: Career Change
careerChange.content: [years] years of experience in [previousField], transitioned to [targetRole] through systematic study. Cross-domain perspective combining [previousSkill] with technical skills to bring unique value to the team. Completed [count] hands-on projects, proficient in [techStack], capable of independent development and problem-solving.

techLead.name: Tech Lead
techLead.content: [years] years of R&D and management experience, Tech Lead at [company]. Led a team of [teamSize], drove the architecture of [product] from zero to one, supporting [scale]-scale business growth. Expertise in technology selection, architecture design, and team mentorship with a continuous focus on engineering efficiency and code quality.

freelancer.name: Freelancer / Indie Dev
freelancer.content: Independent developer skilled in [techStack] with [years] years of full-stack experience. Independently designed, developed, and launched [count] products with a combined user base exceeding [number]. Capable of handling the entire workflow from requirements analysis and UI design to deployment and operations, with a strong focus on user experience and product details.

workGuide.title: Writing Guide
workGuide.tip1: Use the STAR method: Situation → Task → Action → Result
workGuide.tip2: Quantify achievements with data, e.g., "optimized system response time from 2s to 200ms"
workGuide.tip3: Write 3-5 highlights per position, focusing on business impact over technical details
workGuide.tip4: Most detail for recent roles; earlier positions can be more concise
workGuide.tip5: Start with action verbs: Led, Designed, Optimized, Drove, Built, Implemented

backend.name: Backend Dev
backend.highlights:
Led microservices architecture refactoring, splitting monolith into 12 microservices, improving system availability from 99.5% to 99.99%
Designed and implemented distributed task scheduling system, processing [number] million tasks daily with zero missed executions
Optimized database query performance through indexing and caching strategies, reducing core API response time from 800ms to 50ms
Built CI/CD pipeline enabling automated testing and deployment, increasing release efficiency by 300%

frontend.name: Frontend Dev
frontend.highlights:
Led frontend tech stack migration from Vue2 to React + TypeScript across [number] pages
Built component library and design system with [number] reusable components, improving team dev efficiency by 40%
Optimized first-screen loading performance through code splitting and lazy loading, reducing LCP from 3.2s to 0.8s
Set up frontend monitoring system with error tracking and performance metrics, reducing average issue detection time to 5 minutes

fullstack.name: Full-Stack Dev
fullstack.highlights:
Independently built [product] from scratch, covering frontend, backend, and database design
Adopted Next.js + Node.js + PostgreSQL stack, delivered MVP within 3 months
Acquired [number] million users within [number] months of launch, NPS score of [number]
Implemented automated data backup and disaster recovery, ensuring zero data loss

management.name: Tech Management
management.highlights:
Managed a team of [number] engineers, established code review and tech sharing practices, improving code quality by 30%
Led technical planning for [product], defined quarterly OKRs and technology roadmap
Drove team agile transformation, reducing sprint cycle from 4 weeks to 1 week
Hired and mentored [number] senior engineers, achieving 95% team retention rate

projectGuide.title: Writing Guide
projectGuide.tip1: Keep project description concise: 1-2 sentences on the goal and scale
projectGuide.tip2: Use data for highlights: user count, performance gains, cost savings, etc.
projectGuide.tip3: Emphasize your specific role and contribution, not just team achievements
projectGuide.tip4: Mention tech stack in descriptions to help ATS keyword matching
projectGuide.tip5: Personal projects, open source contributions, and hackathon entries all count

webApp.name: Web Application
webApp.description: An online collaborative whiteboard tool supporting real-time multi-user editing, comments, and version history. Built with WebSocket for real-time sync and Canvas rendering engine.
webApp.highlights:
Built with React + TypeScript, integrated CRDT algorithm for conflict-free multi-user collaboration
Supports [number] concurrent users with latency under 100ms
Reached [number] million registered users within [number] months of launch

openSource.name: Open Source
openSource.description: A lightweight React state management library with under 1KB core code and an intuitive API design.
openSource.highlights:
Achieved [number] GitHub Stars, [number] weekly npm downloads
Full TypeScript support and React DevTools integration
[Unit test coverage]% test coverage with automated CI publishing workflow

infrastructure.name: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Enterprise log collection and analysis platform processing [number] billion log entries daily, supporting real-time search and alerting.
infrastructure.highlights:
Built with Kafka + Elasticsearch, reduced log query latency from minutes to seconds
Implemented smart alerting rule engine, reducing false positives by 80% and improving ops efficiency by 50%
Designed multi-tenant isolation supporting [number] independent business lines

mobile.name: Mobile App
mobile.description: Cross-platform health management app for iOS and Android with fitness tracking, diet logging, and health reports.
mobile.highlights:
Built with React Native for both platforms, improving dev efficiency by 60%
Integrated HealthKit and Google Fit for automatic health data sync
Surpassed [number] million downloads in the first month, 4.8 App Store rating

placeholders.highlights: Enter each highlight on a new line...
